title: Who to ask first.
text: Meet your current S3S executive board.

items.name: Janis Palma and Kieran Helbling
items.description: Leads the organization, oversees operations and governance, and represents S3S within RCID, RSA, and the broader academic community.

items.name: Janis Palma
items.description: Supports the President while coordinating social events, member engagement, and community-building initiatives.

items.role: Vice President for Online Student Affairs
items.name: Kieran Helbling
items.description: Advocates for online students by fostering communication, representation, and access across virtual and in-person spaces.

items.name: Rose Ebrahimi
items.description: Maintains organizational records, meeting documentation, and financial tracking to ensure transparency and continuity.

items.name: Frederick Sunkpa
items.description: Oversees the website, social media, and public communications to promote S3S events, initiatives, and identity.

items.name: Amy Maciel
items.description: Serves as a student voice in RCID program planning and development by collaborating with faculty on curriculum, resources, and student experience initiatives.

items.name: Durga Bhusal
items.description: Welcomes incoming students by building connections, sharing resources, and supporting their transition into the RCID community.
